title: Printing generated Excel file or converting it to PDF
author: fbele
body:
Hi,

This subject is not an issue, rather an inquiry.
Instead of downloading the generated Excel File, I would like to print it straight away using browser.

So, the idea is that the standard Print Preview would be shown, where the user could send the file directly to the printer to print it.

The other possibility would be to generate the file straight to PDF and the PDF can be downloaded then.

Thank you in advance for any help.

Regards

comments.author: sennett-lau
comments.body:
You can try to use `node-msoffice-pdf` also with `edge.js`

Check them out on:
[https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-msoffice-pdf](https://www.npmjs.com/package/node-msoffice-pdf)
[https://github.com/tjanczuk/edge](https://github.com/tjanczuk/edge)
